title: A Botticelli Madonna III The Loving Christ
content:

        From birdlike wand'rings, ever come to rest,
        On fostering hand on tender cheek or breas

title: Annunciation - From A Picture By Botticelli
content:
Immortal eloquence of mystic Art!
        How strangely o'er oblivion and gray time,
        That hand doth speak, as in the painter's prime

title: A Botticelli Madonna I The Wondering Angels
content:

        This woman's form enshrineth.    What is this,

title: Annunciation - From The Picture By Botticelli
content:

title: A Botticelli Madonna II The Mournful Mother
content:
